result:
All 484 assertions pass. The task is complete.

**Summary of bugs fixed (17 total):**

**Arity errors (5)** — caught by clj-kondo:
- `analytics.clj`: `orders-in-period` missing `orders` arg
- `audit.clj`: `find-order-by-id` missing `orders` arg
- `billing.clj`: `customer-id` missing `customer` arg
- `notifications.clj`: `->Notification` missing `sent-at` field (added `0`)
- `procurement.clj`: `reorder-needed` missing `levels` arg

**Logic bugs (12)** — caught by verify:
- `catalog.clj`: margin subtraction reversed; `products-by-category` used `product-id` instead of `product-category-id`
- `customers.clj`: gold/bronze discount values swapped
- `inventory.clj`: `reorder-needed` used `>` instead of `<`
- `orders.clj`: `customer-discount-pct` used `customer-id` instead of `customer-tier`; tax doubled with `* 2`; `calculate-total` added discount instead of subtracting
- `shipping.clj`: `carrier-total-cost` used `carrier-id` instead of `carrier-base-rate`; `zone-surcharge` added raw pct instead of computing percentage; `shipping-cost-for-order` passed `"pending"` instead of `order-id`
- `billing.clj`: `invoices-for-customer` used `invoice-order-id` instead of `invoice-customer-id`; `mark-invoice-paid` had status/issued-at swapped
- `procurement.clj`: `lines-for-product` used `purchaseorder-supplier-id` instead of `poline-product-id`
- `promotions.clj`: `campaign-active?` used `campaign-id` instead of `campaign-start-date`; `coupon-discount-amount` divided by 10 instead of 100; `customer-eligible?` used `customer-id` instead of `customer-tier`
- `employees.clj`: `find-employee-by-id` used `employee-hire-date` instead of `employee-id`; `total-commission` stringified the employee-id
- `audit.clj`: `audit-order` used `order-customer-id` instead of `order-id`; `audit-shipment` used `shipment-status` instead of `shipment-id`
